name: manta-agent
description: MANTA Agent v1.1 - Dual-brain sequential with mechanical coordinator. Fully self-contained bundle.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --bundle --external @opencode-ai/plugin
scripts.build:standalone: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --bundle

author: Manta Agent
